pressures.signal: Keep Tiny MVP storage in browser localStorage.
pressures.canonical_signal: browser keep localstorage mvp storage tiny

pressures.signal: Use one browser smoke pass for create, complete, delete, reload on each task-list UI packet.
pressures.canonical_signal: browser complete create delete every packet pass reload smoke task ui use

pressures.signal: Do not add auth, backend sync, analytics, or paid services before the local MVP is useful.
pressures.canonical_signal: add analytics auth backend local mvp no not paid service sync useful

work_boundary: - Carry forward learned decision: Keep Tiny MVP storage in browser localStorage.
- Respect learned constraint: Do not add auth, backend sync, analytics, or paid services before the local MVP is useful.
validation_signals: - Reuse validation pattern: Use one browser smoke pass for create, complete, delete, reload on each task-list UI packet.
